'''Nuboocha''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] businessman who decided to stay on [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]] due to its party atmosphere. His only regret was that he couldn't move his business there, due to its strict zoning laws.

{{Char-stub}}
